title: SYSTEM/CORE/Architecture_Manifesto
content:
# ARCHITECTURE_MANIFESTO
STATUS: **VERIFIED**
AUTHOR: KERNEL_ADMIN

## VISION
The Abyssal Codex is not a mere note-taking application; it is a **Cognitive Architecture** built on the principles of **Technical Brutalism**. 

## DESIGN_PRINCIPLES
1. **SHARP_EDGES**: No rounded corners. Geometry must be absolute.
2. **MONOCHROMATIC**: Color is secondary to structure. Focus on HSL-mapped tones.
3. **DENSITY**: Maximum information per pixel. Avoid wasted white space.
4. **TEMPORAL_INTEGRITY**: Every change is audited. See §{SYSTEM/PROTOCOL/Temporal_Audit}.

## NEURAL_LINKS
- §{SYSTEM/PROTOCOL/Neural_Graph_Engine}
- §{SYSTEM/VAULT/Security_Protocol}
- §{DESIGN/AESTHETIC/Brutalist_Design_Language}

title: SYSTEM/PROTOCOL/Neural_Graph_Engine
content:
# NEURAL_GRAPH_ENGINE
VERSION: 4.2.0
KERNEL: 0xAF

## OVERVIEW
The §{SYSTEM/PROTOCOL/Neural_Graph_Engine} visualizes connections between fragmented knowledge units. It uses a high-performance simulation worker to calculate spatial coordinates for thousands of nodes.

## MECHANICS
- **FORCES**: Many-body repulsion, link constraints, and center-gravity.
- **RENDERING**: WebGL-accelerated canvas with technical overlays.
- **INTERACTION**: Click to focus, Cmd+Click to link-mode.

## DEPENDENCIES
- §{SYSTEM/CORE/Architecture_Manifesto}
- §{SYSTEM/PROTOCOL/Temporal_Audit}

title: SYSTEM/PROTOCOL/Temporal_Audit
content:
# TEMPORAL_AUDIT_LOG
STATUS: LOGGING_ACTIVE

## LOG_STRUCTURE
Every node mutation is recorded in the §{SYSTEM/PROTOCOL/Temporal_Audit} system. This ensures a non-linear history of thoughts.

## AUDIT_FIELDS
- `SHA256_HASH`: Data integrity verification.
- `RELATIVE_TIME`: Human-readable delta.
- `MUTATION_TYPE`: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, LINK.

## REFERENCE
See the §{SYSTEM/CORE/Architecture_Manifesto} for the rationale behind permanent auditing.

title: SYSTEM/VAULT/Security_Protocol
content:
# SECURITY_PROTOCOL
LEVEL: CLEARANCE_ALPHA

## ENCRYPTION_LAYER
Data at rest is secured via **AES-256-GCM**. The master key is never stored on the server; it remains in the client-side vault.

## PROCEDURES
1. **VAULT_WIPE**: Complete removal of encryption keys. Results in data opacity.
2. **RECOVERY_PHRASE**: High-entropy strings for vault restoration.

## LINKS
- §{SYSTEM/PROTOCOL/Temporal_Audit} (for security logging)
- §{SYSTEM/CORE/Architecture_Manifesto}

title: DESIGN/AESTHETIC/Brutalist_Design_Language
content:
# BRUTALIST_DESIGN_LANGUAGE
CATEGORY: UI_SPEC

## VISUAL_TOKENS
- **BORDERS**: 1px solid [var(--border)]. No shadows unless designated as 'depth'.
- **RADIUS**: 0px. Rounded corners are discouraged.
- **TYPOGRAPHY**: Monospaced fonts (JetBrains Mono, Roboto Mono) for all technical data.
- **CONTRAST**: High-contrast monochromatic scales with a single accent color (Primary).

## IMPLEMENTATION
Refer to `src/app/globals.css` for the root variable mapping.

## LINKS
- §{SYSTEM/CORE/Architecture_Manifesto}

title: DEVELOPMENT/OmniConsole_Kernel
content:
# OMNICONSOLE_KERNEL
STATUS: STABLE

## COMMAND_SET
- `LS`: List current directory nodes.
- `TOUCH`: Create new node instance.
- `VAULT`: Trigger §{SYSTEM/VAULT/Security_Protocol} interface.
- `PING`: Verify neural link status.

## INTEGRATION
Connected to the §{SYSTEM/PROTOCOL/Neural_Graph_Engine} for real-time visualization of command outputs.

title: NEXUS/Neural_Networking
content:
# NEURAL_NETWORKING
CONCEPT: KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH

## THEORY
Knowledge is not linear. It is a mesh of nodes and links. By using §{SYSTEM/PROTOCOL/Neural_Graph_Engine}, we can see the clusters of our thoughts.

## CLUSTERS
- **CORE**: System settings and manifests.
- **NEXUS**: General knowledge nodes.
- **VAULT**: Secure, encrypted data segments.

## LINKS
- §{SYSTEM/CORE/Architecture_Manifesto}
- §{SYSTEM/PROTOCOL/Neural_Graph_Engine}

title: META/System_Integrity_Check
content:
# SYSTEM_INTEGRITY_CHECK
DATE: 2026-05-14

## RESULTS
- **GRAPH_SYNC**: 100%
- **ENCRYPTION_BUFFER**: OPTIMAL
- **UI_DENSITY**: TECHNICAL_BRUTALIST_COMPLIANT

## ADVISORY
Regularly backup your vault key found in §{SYSTEM/VAULT/Security_Protocol}.

title: NEXUS/Cognitive_Load_Optimization
content:
# COGNITIVE_LOAD_OPTIMIZATION
STATUS: EXPERIMENTAL

## METHODOLOGY
By stripping away visual clutter (rounded corners, gradients, soft shadows), we reduce the pre-attentive processing required to navigate the UI. See §{DESIGN/AESTHETIC/Brutalist_Design_Language}.

## METRICS
- **EYE_TRACKING**: Focus remains on content nodes.
- **DECISION_FATIGUE**: Reduced by monochromatic color schemes.

## LINKS
- §{SYSTEM/CORE/Architecture_Manifesto}

title: NEXUS/Data_Sovereignty
content:
# DATA_SOVEREIGNTY
CORE_VALUE: ABSOLUTE

## PRINCIPLE
Your data belongs to you. No cloud-first compromises. The Abyssal Codex utilizes local-first persistence with §{SYSTEM/VAULT/Security_Protocol} to ensure your knowledge nexus remains your own.

## TECHNICAL_IMPLEMENTATION
- **LOCAL_INDEXEDDB**: High-performance client-side storage.
- **SUPABASE_SYNC**: Optional, encrypted backup channel.

## LINKS
- §{SYSTEM/VAULT/Security_Protocol}
